Scottish Conference 2026 is now booking

One focused CPD day in Stirling with workshops, trade show, lunch, networking and College updates.

Book the conference

Welcome to the Glasgow Branch

A vibrant and active Scottish branch supporting podiatrists across NHS and private practice in Glasgow through CPD, workshops, courses and professional community.

See upcoming events Contact us

Hello and a very warm welcome to our website. We organise regular continuing professional development events, workshops and courses covering everything from vascular updates to musculoskeletal skills.

Many sessions are online, and we also host face-to-face events throughout the year. Students, newly qualified podiatrists, experienced professionals and non-members are very welcome.

CPD & Education

Regular events and courses on the topics that matter to day-to-day practice.

Community

Connect, share ideas and grow your professional network across Scotland.

Online & In-Person

Flexible learning through online sessions and face-to-face branch events.

Open to All

Students, non-members and colleagues from other healthcare professions are welcome.

Upcoming Events & CPD

Join our upcoming online and in-person learning opportunities. We usually have something running every month, and we would love to see you there.

Monthly case study

Back to Basics: Neurological Review

Every second Wednesday of the month at 8pm. The next session is Wednesday 10 June 2026 with Sarah-Jane Walls and her patient Billy: an in-person neurological case review that is a must for every podiatrist.

  • Next date: Wednesday 10 June 2026
  • Runs every second Wednesday of the month
  • Time: 8pm
  • Next up: Sarah-Jane Walls and Billy, in person

Must-have for practising podiatrists to stay compliant with insurance requirements and maintain essential clinical skills.

Medication CPD

Prescription-only Medication CPD

Laura Jane leads this branch CPD area. Current POM-S update details include online sessions with Dr Jean Mooney, Zoom webinar access, recordings and resources.

  • Current course starts Wednesday 6 May 2026
  • Time: 8pm
  • Full page update to follow

Learn, share and grow with the branch

We’re made up of passionate podiatrists working across both the NHS and private practice in Glasgow.

Whether you are a student, newly qualified podiatrist or experienced professional, the branch is here to help you stay connected, keep learning and feel part of a supportive professional community.

Have a look around, stay in touch and join our channels to keep up to date with what is on.
